title: BBBC021 MCF7 Cell Painting Compound-Profiling Dataset

data_urls.access_notes: Use the official BBBC page for image and metadata downloads.
BBBC021 is listed as a compound-profiling experiment with fluorescence images.

instructions: Use the official BBBC021 page to download metadata and either raw images or derived profiles.
For a first SPECTRA pass, prefer morphology profiles or a stratified image sample before pulling every raw image.
Preserve plate, well, compound, concentration, replicate, and mechanism-of-action metadata in the manifest.

scale.download_size: moderate image collection; use profiles or a stratified image subset for quick audits

recommended_axes.name: compound_structure_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Similarity between compound fingerprints or chemical scaffolds.

recommended_axes.name: morphology_profile_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Cosine or Euclidean similarity between Cell Painting profiles, computed without held-out labels.

recommended_axes.name: plate_and_batch_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Similarity induced by plate, batch, staining, and acquisition metadata.

recommended_axes.name: concentration_support
recommended_axes.definition: Distance from training concentration support for a compound or mechanism class.

useful_for: Testing whether morphology models generalize across compound, dose, plate, and mechanism shifts.
Separating biological morphology novelty from acquisition or plate artifacts.
Building small, interpretable bioimage SPECTRA capsules.
leakage_risks: Replicate wells and fields from the same well can leak across splits.
Mechanism-of-action labels can be confounded with compound identity and concentration.
Plate and batch effects can create spurious spectral curves if not reported separately.
